title: VirtualDyno
help_cv: Engine power in horsepower (1 CV = 735.5 Watts)
help_kg: Vehicle weight in kilograms including passengers and cargo
help_densitaAria: Air density calculated using ρ = P/(R·T) where P is air pressure in Pa, R = 287.05 J/(kg·K), T is temperature in Kelvin
help_cd: Drag coefficient (0.25-0.45 for cars, 0.6-1.0 for trucks)
help_areaFrontale: Frontal area in m² (typically 2-2.5 m² for cars)
help_trazione: Drive type affects weight distribution and traction
error_fields: Please fill all required fields (CV, KG, Frontal Area)
help_minrpm: Minimum RPM at which the engine starts delivering power
help_maxrpm: Maximum RPM before the engine reaches its safety or efficiency limit
chart_0_100_desc: Graph showing time to reach each speed from 0 to 100 km/h.
chart_0_200_desc: Graph showing time to reach each speed from 0 to 200 km/h.
chart_topspeed_desc: Relationship between speed and power demand vs. available power.
chart_power_desc: Blue = surplus power for acceleration. Orange = power consumed by drag and rolling resistance.
chart_torque_desc: Torque curve across the RPM range, showing peak torque and the powerband.
